hypotheses:
FRESH : eq
  (forallb (compose (compose negb (occurs_free_in_trm (inl y))) sigma1)
     (remove eq_dec x (accum_hatom_in_frm p))) true

sigma1,sigma2 : forall _ : sum ivar Henkin_constants,
trm (augmented_language L Henkin_constants)
obligation.goal:
eq (cons_hsubst x t (hsubst_compose sigma1 sigma2) z)
  (hsubst_compose (cons_hsubst x (Var_trm y) sigma1)
     (cons_hsubst (inl y) t sigma2) z)

attempts: unfold cons_hsubst, hsubst_compose; simpl in FRESH. case_eq (eqb z x); [ intro Hxz; rewrite Hxz; unfold eqb; destruct (eq_dec (inl y) (inl y)) as [|n]; [reflexivity | exfalso; exact (n eq_refl)] | intro Hxz; apply equiv_hsubst_in_trm_implies_hsubst_trm_same with (t := sigma1 z); intros z0 Hocc; destruct (eq_dec z0 (inl y)) as [Heq|Hneq]; [ subst z0; assert (Hzx_neq : z <> x) by (unfold eqb in Hxz; destruct (eq_dec z x) as [e|h]; [rewrite e in Hxz; simpl in Hxz; discriminate | exact h]); rewrite (proj1 (negb_true_iff _) (proj1 (forallb_forall _ _ FRESH) z (remove_neq eq_dec z x (accum_hatom_in_frm p) Hzx_neq (proj1 (occurs_free_in_frm_iff z p) FREE)))) in Hocc; discriminate | unfold cons_hsubst, eqb; destruct (eq_dec z0 (inl y)) as [Heq'|_]; [exfalso; exact (Hneq Heq') | reflexivity] ] ].

destruct (eqb z x) eqn:Heq.
- simpl. reflexivity.
- rewrite Heq; simpl. apply (equiv_hsubst_in_trm_implies_hsubst_trm_same sigma2 (cons_hsubst (inl y) t sigma2) (sigma1 z)
    (fun w Hocc =>
      match eq_dec w (inl y) with
      | left H =>
          match H with
          | eq_refl =>
              False_rect _
                (diff_false_true
                  (eq_trans (eq_trans (f_equal negb Hocc) (eq_refl false))
                    (proj1 (forallb_forall (sum ivar Henkin_constants)
                       (remove eq_dec x (accum_hatom_in_frm p))
                       (compose (compose negb (occurs_free_in_trm (inl y))) sigma1)
                       FRESH z
                       (proj2 (in_remove (sum ivar Henkin_constants) (eq_dec _) z x (accum_hatom_in_frm p))
                         (conj (proj1 (occurs_free_in_frm_iff p) FREE)
                           (fun H2 : z = x =>
                             diff_true_false (Heq (match eq_dec x x with
                                                   | left _ => eq_refl true
                                                   | right H' => H' eq_refl
                                                   end)))))))))
          end
      | right H => eq_refl
      end)).

case_eq (eqb z x); intro Hxz.
- unfold cons_hsubst, hsubst_compose; rewrite Hxz; reflexivity.
- unfold cons_hsubst, hsubst_compose; rewrite Hxz; simpl. apply hsubst_trm_irrelevant. apply (proj1 (forallb_forall _ _) FRESH z). apply (proj2 (in_remove eq_dec (accum_hatom_in_frm p) x z)). split.
-- apply occurs_free_in_frm_in_accum; exact FREE.
-- apply (proj1 (eqb_false_iff _ _) Hxz).

simpl. destruct (eqb z x) eqn:Hzx.
- reflexivity.
- apply hsubst_trm_not_free with (v := inl y) (t := t). apply negb_true_iff. apply (proj1 (forallb_forall (compose (compose negb (occurs_free_in_trm (inl y))) sigma1)
                               (remove eq_dec x (accum_hatom_in_frm p))) FRESH z). apply (in_remove (accum_hatom_in_frm p) z x). split.
-- apply occurs_free_in_frm_implies_mem; exact FREE.
-- intro H; apply Hzx; apply eqb_true; exact H.
failed_attempts: unfold cons_hsubst, hsubst_compose; simpl in FRESH. case_eq (eqb z x); [ intro Hxz; rewrite Hxz; unfold eqb; destruct (eq_dec (inl y) (inl y)) as [|n]; [reflexivity | exfalso; exact (n eq_refl)] | intro Hxz; apply equiv_hsubst_in_trm_implies_hsubst_trm_same with (t := sigma1 z); intros z0 Hocc; destruct (eq_dec z0 (inl y)) as [Heq|Hneq]; [ subst z0; assert (Hzx_neq : z <> x) by (unfold eqb in Hxz; destruct (eq_dec z x) as [e|h]; [rewrite e in Hxz; simpl in Hxz; discriminate | exact h]); rewrite (proj1 (negb_true_iff _) (proj1 (forallb_forall _ _ FRESH) z (remove_neq eq_dec z x (accum_hatom_in_frm p) Hzx_neq (proj1 (occurs_free_in_frm_iff z p) FREE)))) in Hocc; discriminate | unfold cons_hsubst, eqb; destruct (eq_dec z0 (inl y)) as [Heq'|_]; [exfalso; exact (Hneq Heq') | reflexivity] ] ].
